summary: Refactored the AI HTTP path from direct controller-to-service calls into controller-to-command/query-handler-to-service calls without adding a Mediator library or changing AiService behavior.
intentionally_not_changed: Frontend, Docker, database migrations, and non-AI backend modules

validations.command: npx skills find "spring boot cqrs tdd"
validations.result: Found public springboot-tdd skill; used existing local Spring Boot TDD skill.
Failed before test compilation because local Java is 17 and project requires Java 21.

risks: Controller constructor has many explicit handler dependencies by design.
Full backend integration tests and Playwright tests were not run.
Local shell Maven verification requires Java 21 instead of the current Java 17.
